panels.prompt:
industrial steel grey + concrete hangar floor + harsh sodium overhead lights, deep blue cockpit interior + soft amber instrument glow, red — Aiko's pilot patch + her ribbon — the only saturated color, Wide establishing — Hangar 7 from the floor. Concrete floor
stretching back. Overhead: rows of harsh sodium lamps. At the
far end, towering 12 meters tall, the silhouette of a heavy
mech — wedge-shaped torso, broad shoulders, exposed power
coupling at the hip. No movement. A single high window lets in
a pale morning grey. The scale is overwhelming — the mech
dwarfs everything., consistent character: Lt. Rei Tachibana: short black hair, military pilot suit with worn patches, slim build, a small jade green ribbon tied to her left shoulder strap (her sister's gift), pilot helmet held under her right arm; Capt. Aiko Tachibana: ABSENT — appears only as: (1) the embroidered pilot patch inside the cockpit, (2) a thin red ribbon visible in a photograph in panel 3, warm morning light, dappled tree-leaf shadows, sRGB color space, iyashikei manga, gentle linework, soft watercolor wash, low contrast, breathable negative space, contemplative mood, Studio Ghibli-influenced lighting, manga panel composition
